prs.title: Add support for Tuya PIR sensor TS0202 / "_TZ3000_c8ozah8n"

aiSummary:
## Universal Tuya Zigbee — GitHub Activity Summary (Forum #140352)

### 🔍 New Device Requests (Issues)

| FP | Device | Status | Notes |
|----|--------|--------|-------|
| `_TZE204_81yrt3l` | Tuya PJ-1203A energy meter | **Needs triage** (#318) | Near-identical to existing `_TZE204_81yrt3lo` (din_rail_meter) — differs by one trailing char. User reports incorrect measurement values. Likely a firmware variant; may need separate dpMappings or divisor fix. |
| `_TZE284_0ints6wl` | Soil sensor (TS0601) | Already covered (#1396) | Currently mapped to `climate_sensor`. User requests dedicated soil sensor support. Consider adding `measure_soil_moisture` capability or a new soil-specific driver. |
| `_TZ3000_hyarhbyx` | 1-gang switch (TS0001) | Already covered (#1395) | FP already exists in `switch_1gang`. Duplicate request — no action needed. |

### ✅ Already Supported FPs
- `_TZE204_81yrt3lo` → `din_rail_meter`
- `_TZE284_0ints6wl` → `climate_sensor`
- `_TZ3000_hyarhbyx` → `switch_1gang`

### 📌 Open PRs — FPs Pending Integration

| PR | FPs | Driver | Notes |
|----|-----|--------|-------|
| [#1372](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1372) | `_TZE200_mgxy2d9f` | motion_sensor | New motion sensor variant — needs pairing/diag confirmation |
| [#1350](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350) | `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab` | TS110E thermostat | New thermostat FPs — verify cluster support (thermostat cluster + Tuya DP) |
| [#1253](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253) | `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p` | 2 devices | ⚠️ `_TZE200_pay2byax` is a known **sleepy TS02xx device** — ensure Passive DP Listener is active to avoid "56 years ago" bug |
| [#1219](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219) | `_TZ3000_gjrubzje` | driver.compose.json update | Single FP addition — needs driver assignment confirmation |
|
